{"rule":"LOG_IN","sentence":"^\\QA) No — the app IS the landing page; redirect to login/dashboard directly\nB) Yes — a simple landing page explaining the app, then enter\nC) Yes — a beautiful marketing page, with the app at /app or /dashboard\nD) Later — V1 just needs the app running\\E$"}
{"rule":"WHITESPACE_RULE","sentence":"^\\Qcircalog.app          → Landing/coming soon page (V1), evolves into full marketing page (V2+)\ncircalog.app/log      → The PWA app itself (always)\nRoot domain is the public face of CircaLog\nApp lives permanently at /log — clean, descriptive, never changes\\E$"}
{"rule":"ENGLISH_WORD_REPEAT_BEGINNING_RULE","sentence":"^\\QYour choice.\\E$"}
{"rule":"ENGLISH_WORD_REPEAT_BEGINNING_RULE","sentence":"^\\QItems marked 🟢 are independent and can be started at any time.\\E$"}
{"rule":"HELL","sentence":"^\\QCreating or editing multiple files in one cohesive task\nSearching for a pattern, function, or import across the entire codebase\nComplex refactors that span components, hooks, utilities, and types together\nDatabase migrations or Supabase schema changes\nRunning tests or linting passes\nAnything requiring shell access or process execution\\E$"}

{"rule":"A_INFINITIVE","sentence":"^\\QAlways use \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q for moving tracked files — otherwise Git sees a delete + a new untracked file instead of a rename, and the file history is lost.\\E$"}

{"rule":"THE_SUPERLATIVE","sentence":"^\\Q🔴 List view of all past sleep entries\n 🔴 Show: cycle number, calendar date, start time, wake time, duration, quality rating, session type (sleep/nap)\n 🟡 Filter by: date range, session type, quality rating\n 🟢 Sort by: most recent first (default) / oldest first\\E$"}
{"rule":"MORFOLOGIK_RULE_EN_US","sentence":"^\\QDate Sleep Log col A\nBed Time Sleep Log col B\nSleep Start Sleep Log col C\nWake Time Sleep Log col D\nSleep Onset Latency Calculated: Sleep Start − Bed Time, displayed as \"Xh Ym\"\nSleep Duration Calculated: Wake Time − Sleep Start, displayed as \"Xh Ym\"\nTime in Bed Calculated: Wake Time − Bed Time, displayed as \"Xh Ym\"\nQuality Rating Sleep Log col I\\E$"}
{"rule":"ENGLISH_WORD_REPEAT_RULE","sentence":"^\\QA Date Date DD/MM/YYYY Calendar date the session started\nB Bed Time Time HH:MM When patient got into bed\nC Sleep Start Time HH:MM When patient actually fell asleep\nD Wake Time Time HH:MM When patient woke up\nE Sleep Onset Latency Auto \"Xh Ym\" C − B, MOD() handles midnight crossover\nF Sleep Duration Auto \"Xh Ym\" D − C, MOD() handles midnight crossover\nG Time in Bed Auto \"Xh Ym\" D − B, MOD() handles midnight crossover\nH Session Type Auto \"Nap\" if duration < 3h, \"Main Sleep\" if ≥ 3h\nI Quality Dropdown 1–5 1=red, 2=orange, 3=yellow, 4=light green, 5=green\nJ Had Dreams?\\E$"}
{"rule":"MORFOLOGIK_RULE_EN_US","sentence":"^\\QA Date Date DD/MM/YYYY Calendar date the session started\nB Bed Time Time HH:MM When patient got into bed\nC Sleep Start Time HH:MM When patient actually fell asleep\nD Wake Time Time HH:MM When patient woke up\nE Sleep Onset Latency Auto \"Xh Ym\" C − B, MOD() handles midnight crossover\nF Sleep Duration Auto \"Xh Ym\" D − C, MOD() handles midnight crossover\nG Time in Bed Auto \"Xh Ym\" D − B, MOD() handles midnight crossover\nH Session Type Auto \"Nap\" if duration < 3h, \"Main Sleep\" if ≥ 3h\nI Quality Dropdown 1–5 1=red, 2=orange, 3=yellow, 4=light green, 5=green\nJ Had Dreams?\\E$"}

{"rule":"ENGLISH_WORD_REPEAT_RULE","sentence":"^\\QA Date Date DD/MM/YYYY —\nB Medication Name Dropdown Populated from reference table\nC Scheduled Time Auto via VLOOKUP Auto-filled from col B selection\nD Actual Time Taken Time HH:MM Leave blank if missed or skipped\nE Status Dropdown Taken / Missed / Skipped\nF Notes Free text e.g. \"took 30 min late\", \"felt nauseous\"\\E$"}

{"rule":"ENGLISH_WORD_REPEAT_RULE","sentence":"^\\Q📥 Import\nImport past sleep sessions from a CSV file exported from the CircaLog Daily Tracker spreadsheet (or any CSV matching the format)\nFull preview table before confirming every parsed row with date, sleep start, wake time, duration, quality, session type, and parse status\nDuplicate detection: sessions already in the app are skipped automatically, re-importing is always safe\nMidnight crossover handled automatically: sessions where sleep start falls past midnight are correctly dated to the following calendar day\nStructured interruption mapping: free-text interruption notes are mapped to typed objects (\\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q, \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q) so they are queryable in future Insights views\nRow-by-row progress indicator during import\nWarn-before-leave: navigating away mid-import shows a confirmation dialog; any sessions already processed are kept\\E$"}
